「 If he could go back in time, he would. Would've apologized before the argument got out of hand, stopped you before you stormed out, saved you before you died in that freak accident. 」

「 But he can't. So as a last resort to bring you back to him, using his connections with Wraith, he transfers the remnants of your brain into an android, designed to look just like you. And that alone, it's enough. 」
